paths.name: jsonwebtoken
paths.message: Server-only crypto. Use it behind app/api/** or lib/umm-crypto.ts — never in client-reachable code.

paths.name: crypto-js
paths.message: Server-only crypto. Use it behind app/api/** or lib/umm-crypto.ts — never in client-reachable code.

paths.name: @/lib/umm-crypto
paths.message: lib/umm-crypto is server-only (guarded by `server-only`). Call it from a route handler under app/api/**, not from a component/page.

no-restricted-properties.message: Secrets and scoring weights stay server-side. In client-reachable code use only NEXT_PUBLIC_* values, read them in app/api/** route handlers, or pass an already-sealed score down as a prop.
